title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pepperfry - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pepperfry - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pepperfry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Pepperfry:
Pepperfry is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
